name: backend-harness
description: Autonomous backend SDLC harness with state persistence, independent evaluation, graduated re-evaluation, mutation gating, and oscillation detection.

interface.shortDescription: Backend SDLC orchestration with quality gates
interface.longDescription: Autonomous backend feature implementation harness layered on Superpowers. It persists run state, isolates worktrees, runs independent backend evaluation, applies graduated re-evaluation, enforces mutation quality gates, and escalates on oscillation or iteration caps.
defaultPrompt: Use $backend-harness to brainstorm a backend feature plan.
Use $backend-harness to implement the current plan with subagents and quality gates.
